name: remu
description: 一个有个性和记忆的 AI 助手 - 从零开始异世界生活·雷姆

scripts.electron: tsc -p desktop/tsconfig.json && node -e "require('fs').renameSync('dist/desktop/main.js','dist/desktop/main.cjs')" && set "ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=" && electron dist/desktop/main.cjs
scripts.electron:dev: set "PATH=%USERPROFILE%\.workbuddy\binaries\node\versions\22.22.2;%PATH%" && set "ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=" && concurrently -k -n server,vite,electron -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev" "npm run desktop:vite" "wait-on tcp:3000 tcp:5173 && npm run electron"
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run desktop:build && tsc -p desktop/tsconfig.json && node -e "require('fs').renameSync('dist/desktop/main.js','dist/desktop/main.cjs')" && electron-builder --dir
scripts.electron:dist: npm run build && npm run desktop:build && tsc -p desktop/tsconfig.json && node -e "require('fs').renameSync('dist/desktop/main.js','dist/desktop/main.cjs')" && electron-builder
